name: MO (Missouri) medium + 60 mM sodium pyruvate (fermentative, no e- acceptor) (PMC8794893)
description: MO (Missouri) medium + 60 mM sodium pyruvate (fermentative, no e- acceptor) — medium reported in PMC8794893 (complex/undefined base — extracts not BiGG-mappable).

provenance.citation: Medium composition from PMC8794893 (see GrowthDB record).
provenance.notes: Complex medium: chemically-defined portion mapped to BiGG; biological extracts listed in `unmapped`. Added via GrowthDB curation.
provenance.formulation_warning: workflow correction sparse; kept original — MO medium under FERMENTATIVE conditions: 60 mM sodium pyruvate as sole substrate, with lactate and sulfate OMITTED and NO terminal electron acceptor (pyruvate fermentation). Anaerobic D. vulgaris Hildenborough. Removed erroneous O2 component / facultative flag (an anaerobic fermentative culture must not contain O2). 'MO' does not stand for Missouri - it is the MO defined medium of ref 59 (Zane/Yen/Wall). A sulfur source for assimilation would still be present in the MO base (trace sulfate/cysteine per ref 59), but NO added sulfate as respiratory acceptor. MO base amounts from cited ref 59.
provenance.verification_evidence: For fermentative conditions, 60 mM sodium pyruvate was used, and lactate and sulfate were omitted from the culture media.

uncovered.name: sodium pyruvate
uncovered.note: no exchange auto-assigned; propose uptake -1.0 pending manual curation
